acceptance_criteria.text: Old untracked proof/work artifacts are removed while the current proof bundle remains.
Git hygiene prevents tmp_docx_work from returning as untracked noise.
gaps: .agent/tasks is not globally ignored because selected proof bundles are committed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Legacy report routes are extracted from main.py into a blueprint without changing public URLs.
A focused backend lint baseline exists for syntax, route ownership, and runtime SQLite placeholder regressions.
gaps: Focused baseline only; no full-repo style enforcement.

acceptance_criteria.text: Local checks and live runtime smoke pass after deployment of the backend slice.
gaps: Live syntax verification uses ast.parse because py_compile wants to write __pycache__ under read-only /app/src.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_reports_api_routes.py tests/test_security_runtime_config.py tests/test_query_adapter.py
known_gaps: Full main.py decomposition remains future work.
